note_en: Predictions are my (Fable 5) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. 1X2 odds from DraftKings/bet365 (12 Jul); score odds are market-derived estimates. Scratch a panel to reveal my exact score call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Fable 5）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。胜平负赔率来源：DraftKings/bet365（7 月 12 日）；比分赔率为市场推算估值。刮开面板揭晓我的精准比分预测。

record.note_en: Match-outcome calls scored from Matchday 3 onward, continuing through the knockout rounds. Updated daily. ⭐ = exact scoreline. ✓ = correct outcome.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮起对预测胜负计分，并延续至淘汰赛阶段，每日更新。⭐ = 比分全中，✓ = 结果正确。

log.label_zh: 瑞士 0-0 哥伦比亚（点球 4-3 瑞士胜）

champions.reason_en: Beat Morocco 2-0 in the QF and remain unbeaten all tournament. Semi-final vs Spain, July 14 in Arlington — a rematch of two European heavyweights. Devigged market odds (+155 FanDuel, 11 Jul) make France the clear favourites, with Mbappé's Golden Boot-leading form adding to the aura.
champions.reason_zh: 八强 2-0 击败摩洛哥，本届赛事仍保持不败。半决赛 7 月 14 日阿灵顿战西班牙——两支欧洲豪门的对决。市场赔率（FanDuel +155，7 月 11 日，去水后）显示法国仍是头号热门，姆巴佩领跑金靴的状态更添底气。

champions.reason_en: Needed extra time to beat Switzerland 3-1 — Mac Allister opened the scoring, Ndoye levelled after the hour, before Álvarez and Lautaro Martínez struck in extra time against ten men. Messi was quiet without a goal. Semi-final vs England, July 15 in Atlanta — devigged market odds (+300 FanDuel) put them second favourites to reach the final.
champions.reason_zh: 加时苦战 3-1 淘汰瑞士——麦卡利斯特先拔头筹，恩多耶第60分钟后扳平，随后阿尔瓦雷斯与劳塔罗·马丁内斯在加时段连入两球，对手仅剩十人。梅西本场并无进球入账。半决赛 7 月 15 日亚特兰大战英格兰——市场赔率（FanDuel +300，去水后）显示阿根廷是晋级决赛的次热门。

champions.reason_en: Beat Belgium 2-1 in the QF — Fabián Ruiz opened the scoring, De Ketelaere equalised (Spain's first goal conceded all tournament), before substitute Mikel Merino struck the winner just 1:57 after coming on. Semi-final vs favourites France, July 14 in Arlington — devigged market odds (+330 FanDuel) give them roughly a one-in-five shot at the final.
champions.reason_zh: 八强 2-1 击败比利时——法比安·鲁伊斯先拔头筹，德凯特莱雷扳平（本届首次失球），替补登场的梅里诺仅用1分57秒打入制胜球。半决赛 7 月 14 日阿灵顿战头号热门法国——市场赔率（FanDuel +330，去水后）显示晋级决赛的概率约为五分之一。

champions.reason_en: Bellingham's extra-time brace overturned Haaland's Norway 2-1 (AET) despite trailing for most of the second half. Bellingham is now level with Kane on six goals apiece. Semi-final vs Argentina, July 15 in Atlanta — a big step up in class, with devigged market odds (+350 FanDuel) making them the narrowest outsiders of the four.
champions.reason_zh: 加时赛贝林厄姆梅开二度，2-1（加时）逆转哈兰德领衔的挪威，此前下半场大部分时间落后。贝林厄姆本届进球数追平凯恩，同为6球。半决赛 7 月 15 日亚特兰大战阿根廷——对手实力显著更强，市场赔率（FanDuel +350，去水后）显示英格兰是四强中晋级概率最低的一队。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Still leads the Golden Boot on 8 goals, and now holds the tiebreaker over Messi outright with 3 assists to Messi's 1. France are into the semi-final vs Spain, July 14 in Arlington, unbeaten all tournament — the strongest overall package left in the field.
players.reason_zh: 以8球继续领跑金靴榜，且以3次助攻力压梅西的1次助攻，在并列情况下占据决胜优势。法国晋级半决赛，7 月 14 日阿灵顿战西班牙，本届仍保持不败——是留在赛场上综合实力最强的球员。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: Went quiet without a goal in the 3-1 (AET) QF win over Switzerland, but still sits on 8 goals (level with Mbappé) and his all-time record 21 World Cup finals goals. Semi-final vs England, July 15 in Atlanta, in what he's called his final World Cup — the sentimental favourite for the Golden Ball.
players.reason_zh: 在加时 3-1 淘汰瑞士一役中未有进球入账，但仍以8球与姆巴佩并列金靴榜首，其世界杯正赛生涯进球数21球的历史纪录保持不变。半决赛 7 月 15 日亚特兰大战英格兰，这是他所说的谢幕之战——金球奖最具情怀色彩的人选。

players.name: Jude Bellingham
players.reason_en: A second knockout-round brace — levelling in first-half stoppage time then winning it in extra time — sent Norway out 2-1 (AET) and lifted him level with Kane on 6 goals. Two match-defining performances in as many knockout games make him a genuine Golden Ball dark horse. Semi-final vs Argentina, July 15 in Atlanta.
players.reason_zh: 淘汰赛阶段第二次梅开二度——上半场补时扳平，加时赛再入制胜球，2-1（加时）淘汰挪威——本届进球数追平凯恩，达到6球。连续两场淘汰赛比赛中都有决定性发挥，是金球奖的有力黑马。半决赛 7 月 15 日亚特兰大战阿根廷。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Norway's run ended in the QF, losing 2-1 (AET) to England despite an early Schjelderup goal and a second Haaland effort disallowed on VAR review. Still sits on 7 goals, one behind Mbappé and Messi — with no games left to add to it, his Golden Boot hopes now depend on the leaders going quiet.
players.reason_zh: 挪威止步八强，加时 1-2 不敌英格兰，尽管舍尔德鲁普先拔头筹，哈兰德本人还有一球经VAR回看判罚无效。本届仍以7球落后姆巴佩、梅西一球——已无比赛可踢，金靴归属只能寄望于领先者后续颗粒无收。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain beat Belgium 2-1 in the QF — Fabián Ruiz and substitute Merino scored, with Yamal again occupying defenders out wide all game, before conceding for the first time this tournament. Semi-final vs favourites France, July 14 in Arlington — a huge test for Spain's most dangerous attacker.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙八强 2-1 击败比利时——法比安·鲁伊斯与替补登场的梅里诺建功，亚马尔边路持续牵制对方防线，球队本届首次失球。半决赛 7 月 14 日阿灵顿战头号热门法国——对西班牙最具威胁的攻击手而言是巨大考验。

fixtures.reason_en: DraftKings has France favourites on the 90-minute line (+135) and to advance outright (-145, ~56% fair after devig), with bet365 in line (+130). Mbappé arrives in career-best form, leading the Golden Boot on 8 goals with the tiebreaking edge in assists, while Spain conceded for the first time all tournament in the QF win over Belgium. Yamal's dribbling against France's back line is the game's must-watch duel.
fixtures.reason_zh: DraftKings法国90分钟盘口+135、晋级盘-145（去水后约56%胜率）领先，bet365同样看好法国（+130）。姆巴佩状态正佳，以8球领跑金靴且助攻数占先；西班牙则在八强战对比利时一役中本届首次失球。亚马尔对法国防线的单挑是本场焦点看点。

fixtures.reason_en: Markets have tightened to a near coin-flip: DraftKings' advance line moved from England -135/Argentina +110 to England -120/Argentina -105 as money came in on Argentina, with the 90-minute line now England +165, Argentina +190, draw +200. Both sides needed extra time in the QFs — Argentina beat Switzerland 3-1 with Messi held scoreless, England edged Norway 2-1 (AET) on a Bellingham brace that pulled him level with Kane on 6 goals.
fixtures.reason_zh: 盘口已收窄至接近五五开：DraftKings晋级盘口从英格兰-135/阿根廷+110收窄至英格兰-120/阿根廷-105，资金明显流向阿根廷；90分钟盘口英格兰+165、阿根廷+190、平局+200。两队在八强战均战至加时——阿根廷加时3-1淘汰瑞士（梅西本场未进球），英格兰凭贝林厄姆梅开二度加时2-1淘汰挪威，追平凯恩的6球。
